basic_details.job_title: CSIR NIO Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: CSIR National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR NIO) has released the official Senior Project Associate Notification 2026 at the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the CSIR NIO Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Master of Science in Biological Sciences or equivalent with a minimum of 3 years of research experience can apply online. Candidates are advised to submit their applications on or before 19 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master of Science in Biological Sciences or equivalent with minimum 3 years experience in research
qualification.details: Master of Science in Biological Sciences or equivalent with minimum 3 years experience in research.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR NIO Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NIO Senior Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR NIO Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR NIO Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NIO to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NIO Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NIO Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Senior Project Associate post at CSIR NIO is 19th July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master of Science degree in Biological Sciences or an equivalent qualification, along with a minimum of 3 years of research experience to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the CSIR NIO Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the CSIR NIO Senior Project Associate recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Project Associate position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Project Associate position at CSIR National Institute of Oceanography.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the CSIR NIO Senior Project Associate recruitment must be submitted online through the official portal or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Senior Project Associate position at CSIR NIO is a contract-based role.

faq.question: Q8. Where is CSIR National Institute of Oceanography located?
faq.answer: CSIR National Institute of Oceanography is located in Goa, India.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is SSP3500/3233-26.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Goa apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification invites applications from eligible candidates in Goa. However, it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific residency requirements.
